free_text: Experimental study of excited states of 62Ni via one-
neutron (d,p) transfer up to the neutron-separation
threshold and characteristics of the pygmy dipole
accelerator, the John D. Fox Superconducting Linear
Accelerator Laboratory of Florida State University.

focal plane detection system of the FSU Super-Enge
integration, and a systematic contribution coming from
